proposals.description: Add doc test to new_with_writer() to satisfy SC-007
proposals.spec_text: All public APIs have doc tests with runnable examples
proposals.actual: new_with_writer() at src/lib.rs:170 has no doc test
proposals.resolution: Add a runnable doc test example to new_with_writer()
proposals.rationale: SC-007 requires all public APIs to have doc tests. new_with_writer() is public and needs coverage.

proposals.description: Add LogLevel to spec Key Entities with its public API surface
proposals.spec_text: Key Entities lists LogLevel by name only with 'Error, Warn, Info, Debug parsed from RUST_LOG'
proposals.actual: LogLevel is a public enum with from_env_str(), Display impl, and Ord ordering
proposals.resolution: Expand the LogLevel entry in Key Entities to document from_env_str() and Display as public API
proposals.rationale: LogLevel is part of the public API surface used by consumers (especially via new_with_writer). Documenting it makes the spec more complete.

proposals.description: Fix stale 'not yet implemented' text in CLAUDE.md
proposals.actual: CLAUDE.md line 9 says 'This component is not yet implemented' but the component is fully implemented
proposals.resolution: Update CLAUDE.md to reflect implementation status
proposals.rationale: Stale documentation is misleading for future development sessions.
